# Fully replaces the original armonorican_language definition.
# All names are 100% custom fantasy — no original mod names kept.

		# Diverse

	female_names = {

		# === CUSTOM FANTASY FEMALE NAMES ===
		# -wen (fair/white)
		name_ceirwen name_aerwen name_tanwen name_brynwen name_prydwen name_llyrwen name_eidwen

		name_morwydd name_golewydd name_cerwydd name_coelwydd
		# -ys (lady)
		name_nerys name_caerys name_heilys name_ceirys name_nevrys
		# -yll (soft form)
		name_gweiryll name_brynyll name_tegyll name_owenyll
		# -edd (visage)
		name_rhanedd name_glynedd name_lleunedd name_gorhedd
		# -el/-ell (bright)

		# Organic
		name_eluned name_gwladys name_llanwedd

	dynasty_names = {
